title: Citadel (disambiguation)
content:
'''Citadel''' can refer to any of several things:

==Canon==
*The [[Jedi]] [[prison]] '''[[Citadel]]''' on [[Lola Sayu]]
*The '''[[Citadel Tower]]''' on [[Scarif]]
*The '''[[Citadel Challenge]]''' on [[Kamino]]
*The '''[[Citadel of Rur]]'''
*The '''[[Sith Citadel]]''' on [[Exegol]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Anaxes Citadel]]''', the primary government building on [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]]
*'''[[Arena Citadel]]''', the main facility of the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]]
*'''''[[Citadel 1]]''''' and '''''[[Citadel 2|2]]''''', an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] freighter group
*The '''[[Citadel/Legends|Citadel]]''', a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Lola Sayu/Legends|Lola Sayu]]; also known as the "'''Citadel Station'''"
*'''[[Citadel (Gamorr)|Citadel]]''', on [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]
*'''[[Citadel Inquisitorius]]''', the headquarters of the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]] located on [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]]
**'''[[Citadel Watchmen]]''', a security team of soldiers based at the Citadel
*'''[[Citadel Station]]''', orbiting [[Telos IV]]
*[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] '''[[Emperor's Citadel|Citadel]]''' on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]
*'''[[Hutt Citadel]]''', a [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] fortress on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*The '''[[ILH-KK Citadel-class civilian cruiser|ILH-KK ''Citadel''-class civilian cruiser]]''', built by [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]]
*'''[[Imperial Citadel (Sith Empire)|Imperial Citadel]]''' on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]]
*'''[[Iron Citadel/Legends|Iron Citadel]]''', once the seat of [[Tetan/Legends|Tetan]] government
*'''[[Citadel of B'omarr]]''', a structure built by the [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Order]]
*'''[[Kabal Central Citadel]]''', the primary government building on [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]]
*'''[[Mazariyan]] Citadel''', a natural fortress on [[Xagobah/Legends|Xagobah]]
*'''[[Mount Corvast Citadel]]''', center for energy-mining operations on [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]
*'''[[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadels]]''', cities for off-worlders on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]
*'''[[Plett's House]]''', also known as "Plett's Citadel", the building above [[Plett's Well]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]
*The '''[[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] [[Rhen Var Citadel|Citadel]]'''
*'''[[Shimrra's Citadel]]''', the palace of [[Shimrra Jamaane]], on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]
**'''[[Citadel garrison]]''', the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warriors assigned to guard Shimmra's citadel
*'''[[Sith Citadel (Ziost)|Sith Citadel]]''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] fortress on [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]]
*'''[[Sith Citadel (Korriban)|Sith Citadel]]''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] fortress on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]
*'''[[Tawntoom Citadel]]''', also known as the '''Frozen Citadel''', on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]

==Out-of-universe==
*"'''[[The Citadel (episode)|The Citadel]]'''", an episode of the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series.

==See also==
*[[Imperial Citadel (disambiguation)]]

|de=Zitadelle
|ja=シタデル（曖昧さ回避）
}}
